TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tim_Bassett, title = Tim_Bassett, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tim_Bassett} }

S.FORM: Tim Bassett sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1951, ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 4, Tim Bassett, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Tim Bassett sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1951, ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 4, Tim Bassett, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: tim βas~ɕs~ɕett s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, tim βas~ɕs~ɕett, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
